# Micro Ct Imaging

**Summary**: A non-destructive imaging technique used to visualize internal structures and porosity of rock samples.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-lawal|Lawal, 2016]] used micro-ct-imaging to characterize the internal structure of eight subsurface shale plugs.
